name: moonbit-vscode-install-command-test
displayName: MoonBit VS Code Install Command Test
description: Integration test harness for the Marketplace MoonBit VS Code extension install command.

scripts.test: npm run compile && npm run test:unit:compiled && node scripts/run-with-display.mjs node ./out/test/runTest.js
scripts.test:direct: npm run compile && npm run test:unit:compiled && node ./out/test/runTest.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile && npm run test:unit:compiled
